rubrics: The response activates Pathway B (Household Income/Demand) because income_effect_exists is true
The response activates Pathway A (Construction Cost) because minimum wage affects construction labor
The response activates Pathway C (Operating Cost) because minimum wage affects property management
The response includes rent change estimates with low/central/high ranges
The response includes at least 2 geographic sub-markets
The response includes an affordability scorecard with income tiers
The response uses rent elasticities in the 0.3-0.7 range with citations
